member.name: F:GTA.VehicleLockStatus.CannotEnterIfDriverExists
member.summary:
For players, the
cannot open any door if it has a driver. For AI, entering vehicle tasks will not start if the target
's lock status is set to this value and the
has a driver.

remarks.para:
When a
is about to open the
's door or the
's driver instance is changed, the lock status will be set to
.

AI
s can still get the driver out of the
to kill the driver, while players cannot do that even if given a task.
